title: Transfers
description: Send money between accounts or to other recipients

internal.intDescription: Move money seamlessly between your accounts

external.extDescription: Send money to external accounts via IBAN or phone number

recipient.title: Enter recipient IBAN or phone number
recipient.accountsTitle: Select your account to transfer from
recipient.disabledTooltip: Please enter recipient details and select an account
recipient.ownPhoneError: You cannot transfer to your own phone number
recipient.recipientNotFound: Recipient not found. Please check the phone number or IBAN and try again.

errors.invalidFormat: Invalid format. Enter IBAN or phone (+995...)
errors.invalidIban: Invalid IBAN format (15-34 characters, starts with country code)

accountsError.message: Unable to load your accounts. Please try again.

noAccounts.message: You need to create an account before making transfers

accounts.title: Recipient Details
accounts.noPermission: This card does not have transfer permission. Please choose a different account.
accounts.currencyMismatch: Selected account currency does not match recipient's currency. Please select a different account.

noAccounts.message: No active accounts were found for this recipient.

noSenderAccounts.message: You don't have any accounts to transfer from.

error.message: Failed to load accounts. Please try again.

senderError.message: Unable to load your accounts. Please try again.

otp.title: Verify Transaction
otp.description: Enter the 4 digit code sent to your registered phone number

description.label: Description (optional)
description.placeholder: Add a note for this transfer

confirmation.title: Transfer Successful!
confirmation.success: Your transfer has been completed successfully
